boy.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark shorts, rain boots, carrying a school bag, cautious expression

cat.description: small gray cat, lean body, bright eyes, wet fur, expressive face, able to speak

refs.note: wide establishing view, rainy backstreet, wet pavement, dim streetlamp
